File.role: GitHub profile page rendered at github.com/GatoGodMode

Section.purpose: Short identity hit: name, one-liner, three bullets (what I build / ecosystem / why scroll incl Microsoft Store), profile link badges incl RawInvestor Store badge, signal-not-noise blockquote
Ecosystem highlight: mermaid pipeline diagram + project/status table incl CollectorBuyerPsych research
Compact visible badge row + Salesforce certification badges; full toolbox badge wall in collapsible details

Collapsible: CRM/Zoho/banks-permitting skills pillars; collapsible: two private build case studies + link to RoofRoofTexas-Rebuild public case-study repo. Summaries styled as for-the-badge EXPAND button bars
Collapsible per-project: Philosophy table, RawEngine, RawGraded, RawInvestor, RawMarkets, TheMoun (with docs links incl schematics). Summaries styled as color-coded for-the-badge EXPAND button bars

File.role: Product whitepaper: thesis, EPIC rollout, engineering architecture, IP themes
Market research: fragmentation thesis, cited demand signals, grading economics
Mechanical ortho, system electrical schematic, OBJ reference mesh
Regenerates system electrical schematic SVG from engineering model

Folder.role: Structural and variable maps only; no other content permitted

Constraints.Rule: TheMoun engineering artifacts in docs/ are intentionally published for portfolio showcase; other repos may retain separate confidentiality rules.
Repo must remain named GatoGodMode to render as the profile README.
